statement_summary: Offensive first-round rookie option adds 5K to the contract salary band; defensive first-round cases should provisionally use half the cost of an extension until codified

Add is one governed acquisition concept across BBID and FCFS; the add window starts on the first waiver run after free-agent auction completion and ends at the configured season end week from league metadata
Drops are allowed from new league website start through league end date, except after the player game starts, during the short pre-auction roster-lock window, and during the free-agent auction

Free-agent auction normally targets the last weekend of July, but timing may remain operationally fluid when league availability requires adjustment; this is a normal target period, not an invariant start date
Final cut-down day should normally fall no more than 48 hours before the free-agent auction starts so cap hits and roster accounting can be finalized before bidding begins

Rules_watch must continuously cross-check live MFL site settings and exports for every governed rule with a source-system equivalent; mismatches must be recorded in the site_settings_alignment_register and classified explicitly so rulebook drift and source-system drift are never silent
Trade availability starts at the new league year, remains open during the offseason and auction, and closes at the kickoff of the Thanksgiving Day game for that season

Trade offers should be delivered by Discord DM to both recipient and sender; lightweight Discord responses are dismiss, not interested, will consider, and open communication, but final acceptance must happen on the website
Pending trade offers should receive nudges every 5 days in the offseason and every 24 hours in-season while the trade window remains open
If a traded player is on taxi when the trade is processed, that player should return to taxi on the acquiring franchise whenever taxi status remains valid

Trades involving players whose games have already started should not process for the current scoring week; UPS_V2 should prefer a deferred next-week processing model when source-system behavior allows it

Discord trade DM behavior is test-only for now; in test it should route through the commissioner-controlled Discord identity stored in secrets, while broader owner-by-owner rollout remains disabled until mapping review and approval are complete
Franchise-to-Discord owner targeting should resolve from stored database mapping logic using discord account details rather than hardcoded usernames

Keith is franchise 0008; both commissioner Discord identities `upscommish` and `ups_commish` are valid test targets for franchise 0008, and the legacy 0010 co-commish mapping should not be treated as a separate owner target for trade DM rollout

Trade salary may be derived only from the current-season salary of selected outgoing active-roster or IR players; taxi players are excluded, and the maximum tradable salary is 50 percent of that outgoing eligible salary base with mirrored cap adjustments between the two sides

Offseason cap overage should not reverse a trade, and regular-season over-cap state should be enforced through lineup-submission restrictions rather than automatic trade reversal; penalty or auto-adjustment policy remains a separate owner-meeting decision
Release 1 trade execution is intentionally limited to self-serve two-team trades; three-way or larger trades remain commissioner-managed exceptions until a dedicated multi-party workflow is approved.

Free agent auction nomination duty starts at 12 PM ET on auction open, requires two nominations before midnight on day one, then requires two nominations per midnight-reset day thereafter for every non-exempt franchise

A franchise may stop nominating only when it is nomination-complete, including when currently leading bids are sufficient to finish minimum roster and valid lineup requirements; if it later loses a required leading bid, UPS_V2 should allow a supplemental nomination, but otherwise a skipped day ends discretionary nominations for the rest of the auction
